title: colymbada cytherea
intro: Colymbada cytherea, also known as Scolymia cytherea, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to Europe and Western Asia, and is also cultivated as a medicinal plant. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Colymbada cytherea can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy with a range of health benefits.
